title: As World Focuses On AI, China Holds The Key In Critical Minerals Race
summary_full: From lithium to rare earths, Beijing controls the mines, refineries and ports that power AI, EVs and defense systems and India's import dependence makes it especially vulnerable.
summary_public: From lithium to rare earths, Beijing controls the mines, refineries and ports that power AI, EVs and defense systems and India's import dependence makes it especially vulnerable.
